error_signature: collection not updating with new URL parameter
context_key: dynamic URL parameter on detail page
title: Collection not updating on detail page with new product ID
symptom: The product detail page does not refresh to show the new product when the URL parameter changes, despite the URL updating correctly.
applies_when: Using a dynamic URL parameter for product ID
Navigating between products on the detail page
not_this_if: The collection updates correctly on navigation
The 'Preserve on navigation' option is disabled
root_cause: When the 'Preserve on navigation' option is enabled for a collection, it prevents the collection from being fetched again when navigating to a new product detail page, leading to stale data being displayed.
fix_steps: Open the settings for the collection on the detail page
Ensure the 'Preserve on navigation' option is disabled
Save the changes and test the navigation again
agent_instruction: Disable the 'Preserve on navigation' option in the collection settings.
